# Q2 Planning — Enterprise motion

DECISION: We will prioritize enterprise tier launch before self-serve growth experiments.

Tradeoff: Speed vs polish — we accept onboarding rough edges for two sprints to hit procurement timelines.

Open issue: Finance wants annual contracts aligned to fiscal year; Sales wants flexible trials.

---

DECISION: We supersede earlier launch-first stance — instead of previous consumer-led rollout we commit to enterprise-first given pipeline concentration.

Tradeoff: Velocity vs predictability — we trade roadmap excitement for revenue certainty.
